data.title: Greenlight's report shows $2B managed by 6.5M U.S. families. Parents and kids investing more for financial independence.
data.description: In Atlanta, the popular family finance and safety app Greenlight® unveiled its yearly family trends report, Greenlight Glimmers. The report showcases that an impressive sum exceeding $2 billion is being overseen by over 6.5 million families in the United States. The year 2025 witnessed a shift in mindset among parents and children towards being proactive in earning, saving, and investing, setting the stage for a promising 2026 marked by self-reliance, assurance, and economic advancement. Despite facing hurdles like economic instability, rising prices, and uncertain employment opportunities, families are striving towards financial prosperity through prudent financial management.

data.title: SNAX-Sational Brands partners with Chiquita to unveil Ecuador-inspired Plantain Chips, made with hand-selected plantains for freshness.
data.description: In Los Angeles, SNAX-Sational Brands has partnered with Chiquita to introduce Chiquita Plantain Chips to the market. These chips, inspired by the flavors of Ecuador, promise an authentic snacking experience. The plantains used are carefully chosen and the entire process – from farm to bag - is completed within a swift 24 hours. This rapid process aims to maintain optimal freshness, crunchiness, and taste. The collaboration ensures top-tier quality and offers consumers a unique snacking option.

data.title: Fortem Tech partners with Southern States LLC to safeguard U.S. power grid from drone threats, offering advanced solutions.
data.description: A partnership has been formed between Fortem Technologies and Southern States LLC to provide utilities with advanced solutions for detecting and responding to drone threats aimed at critical grid infrastructure. Fortem Technologies, a key player in airspace security and counter-drone solutions, has joined forces with Southern States LLC, a renowned leader in high-voltage switching and grid-resiliency technology. This collaboration aims to offer scalable tools to utilities, enabling them to effectively identify, track, and address drone-related security risks. Southern States LLC, with a longstanding legacy in the field, has introduced its Airs technology as part of this initiative.

data.title: Infleqtion appoints Chris Cook as VP of Government Affairs, a Navy veteran with 2 decades in government.
data.description: In Washington, Infleqtion has named Chris Cook as its new Vice President of Government Affairs. Cook, a Navy veteran with 20 years of experience in government roles at the White House, OMB, and the Senate Committees, takes on this role with immediate effect. Infleqtion, a key player in neutral atom-based quantum technology, announced Cook's appointment following a previous announcement in September.

data.title: Greenbriar Equity Group forms Applied Aerospace & Defense, a platform focused on mission-critical solutions.
data.description: Greenbriar Equity Group, L.P. has established Applied Aerospace & Defense (AA&D) to support space and defense tech firms with advanced hardware solutions. AA&D specializes in design and materials engineering, offering rapidly developed, high-performance hardware for mission-critical operations. This newly formed platform aims to empower leading companies in the sector, leveraging decades of manufacturing experience to ensure reliable solutions during crucial moments.

data.title: Core4ce and InfoBase Publishers are launching CrossSight for on-demand due diligence reporting, available in early January 2026.
data.description: Core4ce, a defense technology solutions and professional services federal contractor based in Arlington, VA, has partnered with InfoBase Publishers, Inc., the creator of the DACIS competitive intelligence platform. Together, they are launching "CrossSight," an AI-driven product set to be released in early January 2026. The collaboration was announced at the American Aerospace & Defense Summit. CrossSight integrates Core4ce's AI/ML engine and exclusive data with InfoBase's DACIS platform. This innovative product aims to enhance competitive intelligence and is anticipated to make a significant impact in the industry.

data.title: Glenfarne & POSCO International Corp. finalize Alaska LNG partnership, signing definitive agreements.
data.description: In Washington, Alaska LNG and POSCO International have officially solidified their strategic partnership by signing definitive agreements. This collaboration marks a significant milestone in the industry, with both companies set to bring their expertise to the table. The details of the agreements highlight the commitment of both parties towards mutual growth and success. This move is expected to have a notable impact on the LNG market, with anticipated benefits for both companies. Stay tuned for further updates on this promising partnership.

data.title: SoundHound AI to join Barclays Annual Global Technology Conference on Dec 11, 2025, in San Francisco.
data.description: SoundHound AI has confirmed its attendance at the Barclays Annual Global Technology Conference on Thursday, December 11, 2025, in San Francisco. This event serves as a platform for industry leaders to discuss innovations and trends in the technology sector. SoundHound AI's presence at the conference indicates their interest in engaging with key stakeholders and showcasing their advancements in artificial intelligence technology. The conference is set to feature prominent speakers and attract a wide audience of professionals and investors. SoundHound AI's participation is a strategic opportunity to network, exchange ideas, and enhance visibility within the technology community.

data.title: General Enterprise Ventures (NYSE American: CITR) to share growth opportunities for CitroTech Fire Inhibitors on 12/10 investor call. CEO to discuss strategic roadmap at 1 pm ET.
data.description: General Enterprise Ventures, Inc. (NYSE American: CITR) based in Oceanside, California, is the parent company of CitroTech products for wood and lumber manufacturing, and fire prevention solutions. A conference call is scheduled for December 10, 2025, at 1 p.m. ET to review the company's strategic direction and growth plans. CEO Wes Bolsen will cover recent achievements, product developments, upcoming goals, and key focuses. This call is significant for shareholders and investors interested in the company's progress and future projections.

data.title: Ivans Index Nov. 2025: Commercial Auto down to 6.87%, BOP at 7.46%. General Liability, Commercial Property, and Umbrella see increases in premium renewal rates. Expert analysis on Benzinga.com.
data.description: Ivans, based in Chicago, IL, revealed the latest data on the Ivans Index for November 2025, a key indicator of premium renewal rates in the insurance industry. Yearly comparisons showed that premium renewal rates rose for Commercial Auto, Business Owner's Policy (BOP), General Liability, Commercial Property, and Umbrella policies, while rates decreased for Workers' Compensation. In terms of monthly changes, General Liability, Commercial Property, and Workers' Compensation saw increases in renewal rates, while Commercial Auto, BOP, and Umbrella experienced declines. Notable figures for premium renewal rate changes in November 2025 include Commercial Auto at 6.87% (down from 7.57% the previous month) and BOP at 7.46% (a slight decrease from 7.51%). for more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: JPMorgan downgraded PayPal stock to neutral from overweight as its turnaround is slower than expected, causing a dip.
data.description: PayPal's stock faced a decline following JPMorgan's decision to lower its rating from overweight to neutral, attributing the change to the belief that the company's recovery process is extending past initial expectations. The post discussing JPMorgan's downgrade of PayPal's stock due to a slower than anticipated turnaround under the new CEO can be found on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Lidl US offers holiday meal deal for under $4/person and 77 cent holiday ham, plus limited edition croissant fragrance.
data.description: Lidl US is offering holiday hams at a competitive price of only 77 cents per pound, making it the most affordable option in the market. Additionally, the company has introduced a unique limited-edition fragrance named Eau de Croissant, inspired by its popular 49-cent croissant. In another first, Lidl US is set to launch its inaugural holiday meal deal, providing customers with a special offer.

data.title: NYSE gives pre-market update + hosts 102nd Annual Tree Lighting in NYC on Dec 4, 2025. Kristen Scholer presents insights.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) issued a daily pre-market update through PRNewswire. The update, delivered by Kristen Scholer from the NYSE Trading Floor, offers a preview of market conditions before trading commences. This insightful report gives traders valuable information to make informed decisions. Stay informed with the latest NYSE Pre-market update to stay ahead in the market.

data.title: Airstream launches special edition trailer with Stetson & Four Sixes Ranch, blending luxury & Western heritage.
data.description: In Jackson Center, Ohio on December 4, 2025, Airstream®, renowned for crafting top-tier recreational vehicles, has collaborated with Stetson and Four Sixes Ranch (6666®) to introduce a luxurious towable unit that combines distinctive engineering with a daring sense of adventure, imbued with a touch of Western legacy.

StorageVault completes full exercise of over-allotment option, raising additional $10 million.

data.title: Sola Salons sees record growth in Q4 with landmark studio openings, technology partnerships, leading in independent beauty entrepreneurship.
data.description: Sola Salons solidifies its position as the top independent beauty entrepreneurship leader with unprecedented openings, strategic alliances, and industry accolades. The Denver-based company, recognized on December 4, 2025, has achieved record-breaking launches, securing key partnerships, and earning top honors in the franchise industry. With over [number] studio suites worldwide, Sola Salons maintains its status as the largest concept of its kind, providing a platform for [number] beauty professionals to thrive independently.

data.title: Lewis Line Public Relations signs cultural commentator Ryan Lu for representation in all areas. Gen-Z owned agency headquartered in Los Angeles. Aired on Delulu with Ryan Lu Podcast.
data.description: A new Generation Z-owned agency based in Los Angeles, Lewis Line Public Relations, has recently signed a prominent cultural commentator to represent the host of the Delulu with Ryan Lu podcast and her digital brand across all platforms. This partnership was confirmed on December 4, 2025. The agency has been gaining recognition for its work in the industry, and this specific collaboration highlights their growing influence. The host's digital brand and podcast are expected to reach a wider audience as a result of this alliance with the rising PR firm.

data.title: Cincinnati Insurance Co. integrates Guidewire ClaimCenter to enhance claims operations. Mention of partnership between the two companies.
data.description: In San Mateo, California, the software company Guidewire disclosed a collaboration with The Cincinnati Insurance Company for the implementation of Guidewire ClaimCenter. The successful deployment marks a milestone for Guidewire, showcasing their partnership with a major player in the insurance industry. This development signifies the adoption of innovative technology in the sector, with the potential to streamline and enhance insurance claims processes.

data.title: U.S. stock futures rose, ADP report showed a loss of 32,000 jobs in Nov. Market projects 87% chance of Fed rate cut. Dow +0.13%, S&P +0.11%, Nasdaq +0.13%. UiPath up 9.02% after strong Q3 results. Bond yields: 10-year 4.09%, 2-year 3.51%.
data.description: U.S. stock futures rose slightly on Thursday, with major benchmark indices showing a slight increase. President Trump is considering appointing U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent as chief economic adviser if Kevin Hassett becomes the next Federal Reserve Chair. The ADP report showed a loss of 32,000 jobs in November, indicating a cooling labor market. The 10-year Treasury bond yielded 4.09% and the two-year bond was at 3.51%. The CME Group projects an 87% chance of a rate cut in December. Futures for Dow Jones, S&P 500, Nasdaq 100, and Russell 2000 all saw minor increases. The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust and Invesco QQQ Trust ETF were up in premarket trading. UiPath Inc. stock jumped 9.02% after reporting strong financial results.
